description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a robust, muscular build and a black-and-white color scheme. The front features a prominent push bumper, dark-tinted windows, and side mirrors, while the sides display smooth contours and large wheels. The rear is equipped with a red light bar integrated into the trunk area, and the car has a subtle spoiler. The vehicle's exterior is mostly black with contrasting white doors and roof, and the wheels are dark gray. There are no visible police markings, insignia, or license plates, but the presence of a push bumper and emergency lights suggests its law enforcement purpose. The car appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with rubber tires and plastic trim.
description: A modern black-and-white police car with a push bumper, red rear lights, and large dark wheels. It has a sleek, robust build and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the push bumper, dark windshield, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, large wheels, and black-and-white color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red light bar, trunk, and subtle spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, wheels, and color contrast.
attribute_emergency_lights: A red light bar is visible on the rear trunk area, spanning the width of the car. No roof-mounted or grille lights are visible.
